benefits.description: Running third cycle for muscle growth purposes

side_effects.description: Lipohypertrophy at left belly injection site - abnormally larger and bulging fat tissue, double the size compared to right side. Resistance when injecting (plunger blocked) indicating scar tissue buildup.

protocol_notes: Running third cycle with 3 month on / 3 month off pattern. Administering subcutaneously to belly fat. Injecting multiple peptides in same general area without adequate site rotation over past couple years. Dose on higher end (100-150mcg daily). Later comments clarify the growth was localized fat tissue (lipohypertrophy) not organ growth, attributed to repeated injection site use.
